hero.headline: Software developer from February 2019 to June 2024, now focused on cybersecurity with strengths in IAM and penetration testing.
hero.description: I combine a strong software engineering foundation with hands-on cybersecurity experience to build, assess, and improve secure digital systems.

about.heading: About Me
about.description: I bring together software development experience and cybersecurity expertise to deliver secure, reliable, and well-structured solutions.
about.paragraph: My background in software development from February 2019 to June 2024 gave me a deep understanding of application architecture, system behavior, and secure implementation. Since July 2024, I have focused on cybersecurity, with particular strength in identity and access management and penetration testing.
items: Secure application development grounded in real-world engineering experience
Identity and access management with a focus on governance, access control, and user lifecycle
Penetration testing for web applications and enterprise environments
Clear security recommendations that support practical remediation
about.cardText: A professional blend of development discipline and security-focused problem solving.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: A focused skill set across software development, identity security, and offensive security testing.

items.title: Software Development
items.description: Application development with emphasis on code quality, maintainability, and secure implementation.

items.title: Identity & Access Management
items.description: IAM governance, SSO, MFA, RBAC, least privilege, access reviews, and identity lifecycle management.

items.title: Penetration Testing
items.description: Web application and network testing, vulnerability validation, security reporting, and remediation guidance.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.description: Professional experience spanning software development and cybersecurity, with current focus on IAM and penetration testing.

items.title: Cybersecurity Professional
items.details: Focused on cybersecurity with specialization in identity and access management and penetration testing, helping strengthen access controls, identify vulnerabilities, and support secure remediation.

items.title: IAM & Penetration Testing
items.details: Worked across IAM and pentesting initiatives, contributing to access governance, authentication security, vulnerability assessment, and actionable risk reduction.

items.title: Software Developer
items.details: Built and maintained software solutions with attention to performance, usability, and clean implementation, creating a strong technical foundation for later security-focused work.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.description: Selected work that reflects my development background and current cybersecurity focus.

items.title: Enterprise IAM Rollout
items.description: Supported the implementation of centralized identity management with MFA and stronger access controls to improve both security and usability.

items.title: Web Application Pentest
items.description: Performed security testing on web applications, identified vulnerabilities, and provided practical remediation guidance informed by development experience.

items.title: Access Governance Improvement
items.description: Reviewed identity and access controls to help reduce excessive privileges, improve governance, and support a more secure operating environment.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Open to opportunities in software development, IAM, and penetration testing.
